log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+6=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 40 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:12+6=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 32 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
=== ROUND 1 ===

=== ROUND 4 ===

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 94/99
→ ⚠ Archmage: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 42 fire damage + .

=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:6+6=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:4+6=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 89/99
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Halfling — Bardic Musician.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician healed for 7 HP. HP: 32/67
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.

=== ROUND 7 ===

--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 33 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 8 ===
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 27 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 8 rounds ===
